case_title: RUTLEDGE, ROBIN VS OLSON, HELENE et al

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUTLEDGE, ROBIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OLSON, HELENE DENLEA, LEO MR. (FARMER'S INSURANCE PRESIDENT) WILSON, MARK MR. (FARMER'S INSURANCE) RODRIGUEZ, WILLIAM MR. (FARMER'S INSURANCE) $3,220.06 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,259.06 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
